action.reasoning: Observation: Current waypoint controller yields safe_follow near zero (avg 8.33 in 3 episodes), despite functional pathfinder. Likely root cause is incorrect yaw extraction from quaternion, leading to wrong local angle calculations for waypoint following and human facing. Decision: Run a motion probe in train.py to determine the correct yaw extraction formula (by moving forward and comparing movement direction with various yaw computations). This will inform a corrected heading-based controller in the next iteration. Save dummy checkpoint and run train.py with probe; no eval until yaw is resolved.
